title: Preflight Brief
description: Input to lib/preflight.mjs. artifact_type drives the geometric profile; unknown types fall back to a generic verifiable floor (recognized=false).

artifact_type.description: dashboard | marketing | report | diagram | poster; any other value → generic fallback

format.description: output format; scopes format-specific negation gates (CSS-grid / token-block / web-UI tells are html-only). Omit → all gates emit.

slop.description: Optional slop-axis config. thresholds override lib/slop.mjs DEFAULT_THRESHOLDS.
